name: Impact
description: A Hyperion repeater pistol fitted with a Torgue barrel, giving it higher damage but rougher handling than a typical Hyperion roll. Like other Hyperion guns, it becomes more accurate during sustained fire, but it starts off looser and feels heavier in recoil, reload speed, and firing rhythm.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, Impact variants often appear with Hyperion's newer material set and prefix style. A related variant, the Devigorator, is also found there and uses the older Hyperion line.
